title: Jack o'Golem
description: Causes golems spawned with Jack o'Lantern's to be possessed.
body:
Jack o'Golem causes golems spawned with Jack o'Lantern's to be possessed and attack any nearby mobs. Shear them to remove the Jack O'Lantern and remove the effect.

Client side optional for the pumpkin display.

Made for ModFest: Singularity (1.19) for the Quilt Mod Loader
